---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve devdash
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Press key '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or terminal recordings (e.g., [asciinema](https://asciinema.org/)).

## 🖥️ Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g., Ubuntu 24.04 |
| Terminal | e.g., Alacritty 0.13 |
| Go version | `go version` output |
| devdash version | commit hash or tag |

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
